items.raw_desc: PC játék Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II - PC:Fans of the iconic Starwars saga, beware. The most successful Star Wars action game to date brings its second sequel to build on the previous installment. The game's story takes the player to the period between the Star Wars movies: Episode III of Revenge of the Sith and Star Wars: Episode IV of A New Hope. You will take on the role of Starkiller, a former apprentice of the mysterious Darth Vader, with whom you will embark on a galactic adventure filled with diverse enemies. In order to defend yourself, you will have to discover all of Starkiller's abilities, which are greatly improved in this installment, and the game promises even more "carnage" than in the last installment. You will be able to use e.g. so-called Mind Trick, or the ability to confuse the minds of your enemies, pitting them against their own allies, or the Force Grenade ability, where you grab someone, charge them with lightning, and then send them flying. The Aga Star Projector Galaxie allows you to project stars or galaxies in up to 8 modes.  The projection is coupled with a choice of movement speeds to evoke the sensation of rotation on its axis, maximizing the experience and the overall impression of space. There is also a static setting option where the movement of the nebulae is completely stopped. For more authenticity of the universe, the projector can be turned on to project a spaceship. Projection is possible on the wall, ceiling or a combination of both, depending on the angle of the projector. The illuminated base of the alien ship creates the effect of the ship taking off. items.raw_desc: Vezeték nélküli fül-/fejhallgató LAMAX AirCore1:Ha szenvedélyes zenehallgató vagy, akkor érdemes kipróbálnod a népszerű Lamax által létrehozott vezeték nélküli fül-/fejhallgatónak. Ez a hallójáratba helyezhető (in-ear) termékmodell perfektül tompítja a külső hangokat. Zárt konstrukciója nem engedi ki a hangot, ezáltal a környezeted nem fogja tudni, hogy épp mit hallgatsz. A beépített mikrofon hangok felvételét és telefonhívások lebonyolítását is megengedi. Funkciói között a hangerőszabályozás, a zeneszámok közötti váltás és a hívások fogadása is megtalálható.
